panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes overall equipment health across the major controlled devices.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current temperature conditions for this subsystem.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current vapor pressure deficit for this subsystem.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT state AS "Mode", lead_fan AS "Lead Fan" FROM v_greenhouse_now LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current ESP32 controller mode and lead fan from v_greenhouse_now.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows current or recent operating cost for this subsystem.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows daily light integral for this subsystem or growing context.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current alerts relevant to this dashboard context.

panels.title: Camera 1 — South / Center
panels.description: Public-safe proxy for greenhouse_1 high-resolution source-stream snapshot. Uses API cache headers; refreshes with dashboard.

panels.title: Camera 2 — East / Hydro
panels.description: Public-safe proxy for greenhouse_2 high-resolution source-stream snapshot. Uses API cache headers; refreshes with dashboard.

panels.title: Heat 1

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat1_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the electric heater stage.

panels.title: Heat 2

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Heat 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat2_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the gas heater stage.

panels.title: Fan 1

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the lead exhaust fan.

panels.title: Fan 2

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan2_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the lag exhaust fan.

panels.title: Fog

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fog_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fog_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the fogger.

panels.title: Vent

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_vent_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_vent_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the intake vent/damper.

panels.title: Grow Light

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_grow_light_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Grow Light"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_grow_light_min IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the grow light system.

panels.title: Mister South

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_south_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister South"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_south_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the south mister zone.

panels.title: Mister West

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_west_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister West"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_west_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the west mister zone.

panels.title: Mister Center

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_center_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister Center"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_center_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the center mister zone.

panels.title: Drip Wall

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_drip_wall_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Drip Wall"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_drip_wall_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the wall drip irrigation zone.

panels.title: Drip Center

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_drip_center_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Drip Center"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_drip_center_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows runtime, cycling, or health context for the center drip irrigation zone.

panels.title: Total Cycles

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  SUM(COALESCE(cycles_heat1,0) + COALESCE(cycles_heat2,0) + COALESCE(cycles_fan1,0) + COALESCE(cycles_fan2,0) + COALESCE(cycles_fog,0) + COALESCE(cycles_vent,0) + COALESCE(cycles_grow_light,0)) AS "Total"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Shows total cycle counts across the selected equipment set.

panels.title: Runtime (hours)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat1_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Heat 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat2_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan2_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fog_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fog_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_vent_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_vent_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_grow_light_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Grow Light"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_grow_light_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_south_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister South"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_south_h IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_west_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister West"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_west_h IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_center_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Mister Center"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_center_h IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_drip_wall_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Drip Wall"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_drip_wall_h IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_drip_center_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Drip Center"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_drip_center_h IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows accumulated runtime in hours for the selected equipment.

panels.title: Cycles

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_heat1) AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_heat1 IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_heat2) AS "Heat 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_heat2 IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fan1) AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_fan1 IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fan2) AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_fan2 IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fog) AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_fog IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_vent) AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_vent IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_grow_light) AS "Grow Light"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND cycles_grow_light IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Shows on/off cycle counts for the selected equipment.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan2_min IS NOT NULL

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fan1_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fan2_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan2_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT now() AS time,
  CASE WHEN SUM(runtime_fan1_min) + SUM(runtime_fan2_min) = 0 THEN 50
       ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(runtime_fan1_min) / (SUM(runtime_fan1_min) + SUM(runtime_fan2_min)), 1)
  END AS "Fan 1 %"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.title: Fan / Vent Timeline

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 1"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 2"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Vent"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows whether fan lead/lag is balanced and whether the vent is actually paired with fan calls.

panels.title: Fan Runtime Balance

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan1_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 1" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan2_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Fan 2" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_vent_min)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS "Vent" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Current range runtime comparison for fan wear balance and vent coupling.

panels.title: Fan Imbalance

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND((ABS(COALESCE(SUM(runtime_fan1_min),0) - COALESCE(SUM(runtime_fan2_min),0)) / GREATEST(COALESCE(SUM(runtime_fan1_min),0) + COALESCE(SUM(runtime_fan2_min),0), 1) * 100.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Imbalance" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Percent runtime skew between fan1 and fan2 over the dashboard time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_heat1_min / 60.0 AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_heat2_min / 60.0 AS "Heat 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_heat2_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fan1_min / 60.0 AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan1_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fan2_min / 60.0 AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fan2_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fog_min / 60.0 AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_fog_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_vent_min / 60.0 AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_vent_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_grow_light_min / 60.0 AS "Grow Light"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_grow_light_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_mister_south_h AS "Mister South"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_south_h IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_mister_west_h AS "Mister West"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_west_h IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_mister_center_h AS "Mister Center"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_mister_center_h IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

panels.title: 30-Day Equipment Runtime Mix

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_heat1_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Heat 1" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_heat2_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Heat 2" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_fan1_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Fan 1" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_fan2_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Fan 2" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_fog_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Fog" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND((runtime_vent_min/60.0)::numeric,2) AS "Vent" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), ROUND(COALESCE(runtime_mister_south_h,0)::numeric + COALESCE(runtime_mister_west_h,0)::numeric + COALESCE(runtime_mister_center_h,0)::numeric,2) AS "Misters" FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '30 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Daily runtime mix for the last 30 days independent of the selected time range. Good for spotting seasonal shifts and runaway equipment. Panel overrides dashboard time range to 30d.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), heap_bytes AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND heap_bytes IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), wifi_rssi AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wifi_rssi IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), uptime_s AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uptime_s IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), reset_reason AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND reset_reason IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: ESP32 WiFi RSSI

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), wifi_rssi AS "RSSI" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wifi_rssi IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Controller WiFi signal; more negative is worse.

panels.title: ESP32 Heap Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), heap_bytes AS "Free Heap" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND heap_bytes IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), heap_min_free_kb AS "Min Free" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND heap_min_free_kb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), heap_largest_free_block_kb AS "Largest Block" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND heap_largest_free_block_kb IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Heap trend and fragmentation indicators. Values are KB from ESP32 diagnostics.

panels.title: Controller Timers & Relief

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_watch_timer_s AS "VPD Watch" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_watch_timer_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), sealed_timer_s AS "Sealed" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND sealed_timer_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), mist_backoff_timer_s AS "Mist Backoff" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND mist_backoff_timer_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), relief_cycle_count AS "Relief Cycles" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND relief_cycle_count IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: FSM timer visibility: watch dwell, sealed mist duration, backoff, and thermal relief cycling.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), flow_gpm AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND flow_gpm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  $__time(ts),
  water_total_gal AS "Water Used (gal)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  $__time(ts),
  flow_gpm AS "Flow (gal/min)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND flow_gpm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Mister / Irrigation Timeline

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister South"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister West"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Wall"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_wall' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Water Flowing"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'water_flowing' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Correlates valve activity with water-flow events; catches stuck valves and missing flow.

panels.title: Water Flow & Totalizer

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), flow_gpm AS "Flow GPM" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND flow_gpm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "Total gal" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Water meter live flow and cumulative totalizer. Use with valve timeline to verify commanded irrigation actually moved water.

panels.title: Mister Zone Runtime

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_south_h)::numeric,2) AS "South" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_west_h)::numeric,2) AS "West" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_center_h)::numeric,2) AS "Center" FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Mister runtime by zone; useful for confirming south-first/west-second prioritization and center underperformance.

panels.title: Equipment Now

targets.rawSql: SELECT equipment, CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS status, to_char(since AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'HH:MI AM') AS since, ROUND(seconds_ago/60.0) AS min_ago FROM v_equipment_now WHERE equipment IN ('heat1','heat2','fan1','fan2','fog','vent','mister_south','mister_west','mister_center','grow_light_main','grow_light_grow','drip_wall','drip_center') ORDER BY state DESC, equipment

panels.description: Shows the current on/off state of major greenhouse equipment.
